name: JOHNSON OUTDOORS INC
summary: Johnson Outdoors is a global manufacturer and marketer of branded outdoor recreation products organized into three segments: Fishing (Minn Kota trolling motors, Humminbird sonar/GPS, Cannon downriggers), Camping & Watercraft Recreation (Jetboil cooking systems, Old Town canoes/kayaks, Carlisle paddles), and Diving (SCUBAPRO regulators, buoyancy compensators, dive computers, wetsuits). Products are sold through specialty retailers, OEM boat manufacturers, distributors, and direct-to-consumer channels globally. The company was incorporated in Wisconsin in 1987.

products.name: Minn Kota
products.description: Electric trolling motors, marine battery chargers, and shallow water anchors for fishing boats

products.name: Humminbird
products.description: Sonar and GPS equipment for fish finding, navigation, and marine cartography

products.name: Jetboil
products.description: Portable outdoor cooking systems including single and two burner stoves and accessories

products.name: Old Town
products.description: Canoes, kayaks, and advanced personal watercraft equipment for recreation, touring, and angling

products.name: Carlisle
products.description: Branded paddles sold as accessories for paddling activities

products.name: SCUBAPRO
products.description: Complete line of underwater diving and snorkeling equipment including regulators, buoyancy compensators, dive computers, wetsuits, masks, fins, and snorkels

partnerships.description: OEM boat brand that sells products incorporating Johnson Outdoors fishing equipment
